layout: Three filter row (Select scrape pool | PillsInput state | Search labels) + collapse-all icon. Accordion per scrape pool.

search_input.note: Different placeholder than /targets ('Filter by endpoint or labels') — subtle inconsistency; this one filters by labels only

accordion_items: Same style as /targets — white bg, borderRadius 4px, borderLeft 5px solid green (up) / red (down).
panel_layout: Two-column: 'Discovered labels' (left) vs 'Target labels' (right). Each a stack of pill-badges like __address__="...", job="demo".

link_show_relabeling.note: Displayed as a raw text link inside the panel. Other places use buttons for inline actions — this is a Mantine Anchor (text link) as a disclosure trigger. Inconsistency with other in-app action buttons.

status_indicator: Green circle next to 'N / M' counter; chevron to expand/collapse accordion.
page_similarity_to_targets: Same accordion/filter/status-circle/borderLeft color system; shares patterns. Content columns differ.
